feedItems.description: allocated £23.9m to Public Health (≈£83 per resident)
allocated £80.7m to Children's Social Care (≈£282 per resident)
allocated £125.0m to Adult Social Care (≈£437 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £122 (5.2%) to £2461
